title: useDidUpdate
description: Runs a callback only on updates (not on initial mount), useful for responding to prop or state changes.
summary: Triggers effects after updates, skipping the initial mount.

`,(0,t.jsx)(r,{name:"use-did-update",code:`"use client";\r
import { DependencyList, EffectCallback, useEffect, useRef } from "react";\r
\r
export function useDidUpdate(fn: EffectCallback, dependencies?: DependencyList) {\r
  const mounted = useRef(false);\r
\r
  useEffect(\r
    () => () => {\r
      mounted.current = false;\r
    },\r
    []\r
  );\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    if (mounted.current) {\r
      return fn();\r
    }\r
\r
    mounted.current = true;\r
    return undefined;\r
  }, dependencies);\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-did-update.ts"})]})}function u(n={}){let{wrapper:e}=n.components||{};return e?(0,t.jsx)(e,{...n,children:(0,t.jsx)(l,{...n})}):l(n)}function b(n,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+n+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return y(C);})();
